title: Welcome to cyberdeck.club Beta!
content:
We're excited to launch our beta! Here are some things to know:

- This is an early release
- Features are being added weekly
- Please report bugs via the feedback widget

Happy building! 🚀

title: New Feature: Forum Categories
content:
We've added forum categories to help organize discussions:

- **General** - All-purpose discussion
- **Builds** - Share your builds
- **Help** - Ask for assistance
- **Show & Tell** - Show off your work

Check them out!

title: Community Guidelines Now Live
content:
Our community guidelines are now in effect! Please take a moment to read them:

- [Read the Guidelines](/guidelines)

Key points:
- Be kind and respectful
- No harassment or hate speech
- Credit your inspirations
- Have fun!

Thanks for helping make this a great space! ✨

title: Upcoming Maintenance: April 15
content:
We'll be performing scheduled maintenance on April 15th from 2-4 AM EST. The site may be briefly unavailable.

**What's changing:**
- Performance improvements
- Database optimization
- Bug fixes

Thank you for your patience! 🔧
